scenario_description: Sequential 4-step workflow: sort data, add formulas, create summary sheet, format headers.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: First, add a 'Total' column at the end that sums all monthly values for each sales rep.
Now sort the entire table by the Total column from highest to lowest.
Create a new sheet called 'Summary'. In A1 write 'Top Performer', in B1 write the name of the sales rep with the highest total.
Go back to Sheet1, make the header row bold, then save the file.

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl=pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/SalesRep.xlsx'); has_summary='Summary' in xl.sheet_names; df=pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/SalesRep.xlsx'); has_total=any('total' in str(c).lower() for c in df.columns); print('PASSED' if has_summary and has_total else 'FAILED')"
